summary: Validate Custom Fields Values With Configurable Field Set
description: Returns validation failure/success messages for values supplied to custom fields within the configurable field set.

valid.description: True = attributes is valid, errors is empty, False = invalid, errors not empty

errors.description: Errors on fields, empty object if valid is true

custom_field_47393.description: An array of validation failure messages.

custom_field_58238.description: An array of validation failure messages.

number.description: An array of validation failure messages.

attributes.description: An object with configurable & custom field keys and values to be validated. This is for example purposes only.

custom_field_47393.description: The value to be validated for custom field with id 47393

custom_field_58238.description: The value to be validated for custom field with id 58238

title.description: The value to be validated for configurable field "title"

number.description: The value value to be validated for configurable field "number"
